name: Okra Italiano
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Okra, cut into 1/2-inch thick rounds
Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onion, garlic, tomatoes, okra, and white wine in a large skillet.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Add bay leaf and oregano. Reduce heat to medium-low and cover the skillet.
4. Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
6. Ladle the sauce over cooked rice.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley and sliced olives.
